metadata.description: Less skills. Deeper connections. A lean, interconnected skill ecosystem for Claude Code.

plugins.name: rune
plugins.description: 61 skills wired into a self-aware 5-layer mesh — 200+ connections, adaptive routing, mesh analytics, logic preservation. Use rune:cook for any code task, rune:team for parallel work, rune:launch for deploy, rune:rescue for legacy code.

plugins.name: @rune/ui
plugins.description: Frontend UI patterns — design systems, accessibility, animation

plugins.name: @rune/backend
plugins.description: Backend patterns — API, auth, database, middleware

plugins.name: @rune/devops
plugins.description: DevOps — Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, server setup

plugins.name: @rune/mobile
plugins.description: Mobile — React Native, Flutter, app store, native bridge

plugins.name: @rune/security
plugins.description: Deep security — OWASP audit, pentest, compliance

plugins.name: @rune/trading
plugins.description: Fintech — real-time data, charts, indicators, trade logic preservation

plugins.name: @rune/ai-ml
plugins.description: AI/ML — LLM integration, RAG, embeddings, fine-tuning

plugins.name: @rune/gamedev
plugins.description: Game dev — Three.js, WebGL, game loops, physics

plugins.name: @rune/content
plugins.description: Content — blog, CMS, MDX, i18n, SEO

plugins.name: @rune/analytics
plugins.description: Analytics — tracking, A/B testing, funnels, dashboards

plugins.name: @rune/chrome-ext
plugins.description: Chrome Extension — manifest v3, service workers, content scripts, popup UI

plugins.name: @rune-pro
plugins.description: Rune Pro — Product Management, Sales, Data Science, Support. 4 premium packs with deep business workflows. $49 lifetime.

plugins.name: @rune-business
plugins.description: Rune Business — Finance, Legal, HR, Enterprise Search. 4 enterprise packs + all Pro packs included. $149 lifetime.
